title: Sid Ozalid Amazing Wonders Of Scotland
description: If you like silly you will love Sid. High energy, interactive nonsense for the whole family. From the Edinburgh Fringe to international stages in New York, Paris, Melbourne and beyond, Sid has built a legendary reputation for shows that are unpredictable, magical and utterly unforgettable. A wonderful blend of mayhem, magic, poetry, dad dancing and mentalism. This is your chance to learn all about Scottish culture, why Scotland invented all the cool stuff in the world and finally learn what is hiding under the kilt. You will not believe your eyes or your ears, and may end up being more Scottish than you were on the way in! Expect the impossible. Sid doesn’t just perform magic — he plays with reality. Engaging nonsense for everyone from the age of eight to 80!
content_warnings: There may be a reference to the Loch Ness Monster
